title: Breach and Density Mace Pack
description: A resource pack for 1.21.5+ that changes the sprite of your mace based on its enchantments. Doesn't require optifine or other mods.
body:
This is a simple PvP resource pack that gives different skins to your maces based on enchantment (One for none, one for Breach, and one for Density). It doesn't require additional mods such as Optifine, and runs fine on Vanilla

NOTICE:
If you wish to use files in this (code or image) please contact me on discord (willstuff1111). Don't use them without permission, as that violates All Rights Reserved liscencing.

Good for those of you who forget which mace is which like me :D

At the moment it'll read outdated resource pack in versions higher than 1.21.5, but it will still work fine.
